summary: CRITICAL BUG TEST: The 'See {Pet}'s Home' button on payoff screen WORKS CORRECTLY. Unable to reproduce the reported bug. Completed 3 full end-to-end tests (2 desktop, 1 mobile) - all successful. All 8 backend API tests passed. The button properly calls handleFinalSubmit which: 1) Creates account via /api/membership/onboard, 2) Auto-logs in via /api/auth/login, 3) Saves token to localStorage, 4) Navigates to /pet-home via window.location.href.

minor.issue: Returns 405 - breed detection API not available. Falls back to manual breed selection (expected behavior).
Returns 404 when endpoint doesn't exist - non-blocking for onboarding flow.

action_items: INVESTIGATE USER'S BROWSER ENVIRONMENT - Bug could not be reproduced. Possible causes: 1) Browser cache, 2) Ad blocker blocking API, 3) localStorage restrictions, 4) Network timeout, 5) Browser extension interference
OPTIONAL: Add better error message handling when data.detail is an array (Pydantic validation errors)
critical_code_review_comments: The handleFinalSubmit function at line 567-673 is correctly implemented
Button at line 1557 has correct onClick={handleFinalSubmit} binding
Button is correctly disabled during loading state to prevent double clicks
API error handling could be improved for array-type detail responses
Consider adding more console.log statements for debugging user issues
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during onboarding flow tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: The 'See Pet's Home' button bug could NOT be reproduced. The onboarding flow works correctly in automated testing (both desktop and mobile viewports). Console logs show successful API calls: [Onboarding] Creating new account → Create account response: success → Login response: success → Navigation to /pet-home. If the user still experiences the issue, it's likely a client-side environment problem (browser cache, extensions, network).

features_verified.see_pets_home_button_clicks: PASS - Button click triggers handleFinalSubmit correctly
features_verified.handleFinalSubmit_called: PASS - Console logs show '[Onboarding] Creating new account...'
features_verified.javascript_errors: NONE FOUND - No page errors during testing
features_verified.localstorage_token_saved: PASS - Navigation to /pet-home confirms token saved
features_verified.complete_new_user_flow: PASS - Full flow: photo → breed → gender → name → birthday → parent → soul (13 Q) → payoff → pet-home

possible_causes_for_user_issue: Ad blocker or privacy extension blocking API calls
recommended_user_actions: Hard refresh with Ctrl+Shift+R (or Cmd+Shift+R on Mac)
Clear site data and try again
